name: Steamy Smoked Oyster Dip
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Smoked Oysters (about two 3.6 oz cans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use two 3.6 oz cans of smoked oysters. Rinse and drain the oysters, then mash them with a fork.
2. Melt the butter in a frying pan. Brown the almonds on all sides in the melted butter. Remove the almonds and set aside.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth. Add the milk, pepper to taste, horseradish, and chopped onion. Blend well.
4. Fold in the mashed oysters. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle the browned almonds on top. Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes or until bubbly.
6. Serve hot. Makes about 2 1/4 cups of dip.
7. Suggested dippers: Potato Chips, Tortilla Chips, Cheese Crackers, Bell Peppers, Fennel, Zucchini
